exercises.name: Smith Machine Tricep Dip
exercises.description:
1.  Start by setting the bar to hip height. 

2. Place your feet in front of the bar, bending your knees, and bringing your hands shoulder-width onto the bar.

3. Bend your elbows straight back to descend slowly under control. 

4. Push yourself back up to the start position using your arms. Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Upright Row
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing with your hands shoulder-width, gripping the bar at hip height. 

2. Bring the bar up to your chest by driving your elbows up and outwards.

3. Slowly return to the start position, and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Tricep OH Extension
exercises.description: Smith Tricep OH Extension

exercises.name: Sorenson Hold
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing your feet in the foot pads of a GHD, and facing away from the feet. 

2. Fully extend your legs so that your torso is parallel to the floor, with hips in contact with the large pad. 

3. Keep a neutral spine position, and continue pressing your hips into the pad to maintain this position.

exercises.name: Spiderman Alternating Lunge
exercises.description:
1.Start in the top position of a push up with your arms and legs straight.

2.Step one foot forward to your hand, bending at the knee, keeping the other leg straight.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Alternate sides with each rep.

exercises.name: Spiderman Plank
exercises.description:
1.Support your body off the floor, resting on your toes and elbows.

2.Raise one foot off the floor, bending at the knee bring it to your elbow while remaining in the plank position.

3.Return your foot back to starting position.

4.Repeat on the other side. Alternate sides with each rep.

exercises.name: Spiderman Push Up
exercises.description:
1.Start in the top position of a push up with your arms straight. 

2.Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the floor while also bending one knee and bringing it to your elbow with your foot off the floor.

3.Push back up to the top position.

4.Repeat with the other leg to the other elbow. Make sure to perform one rep on one side, then switch to the other side.

exercises.name: Split Squat Pulse
exercises.description: Lower into a split squat position and pulse up and down in small motions, maintaining a low position to target the legs and glutes.

exercises.name: Split Squat to Kick Back
exercises.description:
Stand in a split stance with one foot forward and the other foot back, keeping your torso upright and core engaged. 

Lower your body into a split squat by bending both knees, keeping your front knee over your ankle. 

As you press through your front heel to return to standing, extend your back leg straight behind you into a kickback, squeezing your glutes at the top.

exercises.name: Split Squat to Lateral Raise
exercises.description:
Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand by your sides. Step one leg back into a split squat position, bending both knees to roughly 90 degrees, with your front knee above the ankle and your back knee pointing toward the floor. 

Keep your torso upright and core engaged. Push through your front heel to return to standing, and as you rise, lift the dumbbells out to your sides until they reach shoulder height, performing a lateral raise.

exercises.name: Split squat w/ lateral/ frontal holds
exercises.description: Use light weights 2-5lbs

exercises.name: Split Stance Dumbbell Wide Row
exercises.description: Assume a split stance. Row dumbbells out wide to shoulder height while keeping elbows slightly bent.

exercises.name: Split Stance Reverse Fly
exercises.description: Hinge at the hips in a split stance. Raise dumbbells out to the sides at shoulder height. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Split Stance Single Arm row
exercises.description: In a split stance, hinge at the hips. Row dumbbells toward your torso, keeping your back flat.

exercises.name: Sprawling Pretzel
exercises.alternateName: Brettzel, hip and glute rotation stretch
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on your back on the mat with knees bent, feet planted on the floor.

2. Bring one knee in towards your chest, while bringing your opposite foot up towards your body, near the floor. 

3. Clasp your hand around the foot nearest to the floor, and the opposite hand on the knee of the leg closest to the body. 

4. Gently draw the top knee across your body and down towards the floor in a twisting motion. 

5. Relax and breathe in this position - you should feel a gentle stretch, not any painful or stabbing sensations.

6. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Squat Jump
exercises.description:
1. Start by slowly descending into a squat by sitting back into your hips and knees. 

2. Push the floor away and fully extend your hips and knees, leaving the floor as you come upwards.

3. Land softly under control while keeping the knees in line with your hips and feet, not allowing them to cave inwards. 

4. Repeat for desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Squat Pulse
exercises.description: Lower into a squat position and pulse up and down in small motions while keeping tension in the legs and glutes.

exercises.name: Squat to  Alternating Kick
exercises.description:
1. When performing this exercise, ensure you have proper squat form. Sit your hips back and as you stand, ensure you pull your stomach in to engage your core.

2. To begin, bend your knees and sit back as far as you can, stand, then kick your right leg in front of you, foot flexed.

3. Repeat, kicking with your left leg, and continue alternating.

exercises.name: Squat to Alternating Punch
exercises.description:
1. When performing this exercise, ensure proper squat form. 

2. Sit your hips back rather than letting your knees come over your toes. This will be your starting position.

3. As you stand, ensure that you squeeze your glutes and pull your tummy in, while punching one hand forward and back to starting position. Alternate left and right arms. 

4. Repeat.

exercises.name: Squat to Calf Raise
exercises.description: Perform a bodyweight squat, then rise onto your toes at the top for a calf raise before lowering back down.

exercises.name: Squat to Hinge
exercises.description: Start in a squat, then extend your hips into a hinge position before returning to a squat. Maintain a strong core throughout.

exercises.name: Squat to Squat Jump
exercises.description:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and core engaged. Lower into a squat with hips back and chest upright. 

From the squat, explode upward into a jump, fully extending through the hips, knees, and ankles. 

Land softly and immediately return to the squat position to repeat the movement continuously.

exercises.name: Squat to T-Rotation
exercises.description:
Perform a squat, then as you stand, rotate your torso and reach one arm upward. 

Repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Squat To T-Rotation
exercises.description: Perform a squat and, as you rise, rotate your torso to one side, extending your arm overhead. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Squat w/ DB swing into RDL w/ Db swing
Squat with cable low to high chop
Squat/ sumo with plate under toes into
exercises.description: Place 5-10 lbs weight plates under toes. Complete desired reps for squats. Move plate wider and go into sumo squats.

exercises.name: Squatting alt Db bicep curl
exercises.description: Squat down , place the back of your arms on your knees. Right arm bicep curl , left arms, then both. That is 1 rep.

exercises.name: Squatting Internal Alternating Rotation
exercises.description:
1. When performing this mobility exercise, ensure that you have your balance and you're going to rotate your knee all the way to the ground.

2. Get your body into sitting position with your glutes close to the ground and knees shoulder width apart. Hands together. This will be your starting position.

3. Rotate one knee all the way to the ground. The back to starting position.

4. Repeat movement on the other knee.
